_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representing the assigned domain's interests and escalating unresolved issues through established channels.
comments: NICE task intersects with WIDAI DG domain. Task DG-T-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-A-005 (DG, cosine: 0.487), DQ-S-009 (DQ, cosine: 0.477).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark. Both texts processed jointly through transformer; outputs calibrated 0-1 similarity score.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.4/10 (raw 0.538). Shared vocabulary: [channels]. NICE-only terms [communication, establish, stakeholder] vs WIDAI-only terms [assigned, community, council, data, domain, escalating] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.description: Token-level contextual embedding matching. Precision = FDE coverage of KSA tokens. Recall = KSA coverage by FDE tokens. F1 = harmonic mean.
bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.892, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.036 — the NICE element's 4 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 21 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the NICE element.

nli_cross_encoder.description: Natural Language Inference. Classifies text pair as entailment, neutral, or contradiction. Indicates directional implication strength.
nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.4%). "Establish stakeholder communication channels" and "Participate in the data governance council and stewardship community, representi" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity. Each text encoded independently; measures vector-space proximity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.505 ≈ STS 0.538 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [channels] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens). Purely lexical baseline, hand-traceable.
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.3%. Shared tokens: [channels]. NICE-only: [communication, establish, stakeholder]. WIDAI-only: [assigned, community, council, data, domain, escalating].
